microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **agent platform** for recovery validation from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, self-service model for frontline ops teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model tied to measurable agent productivity gains.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, coordinating across Operations, Legal, and Compliance stakeholders.

Defined the metrics framework — covering adoption, quality, and operational outcomes — to evaluate platform health across all drill programs, enabling data-driven iteration and surfacing the highest-friction workflows for roadmap prioritization.

Scaled team leverage through **AI-enabled automation**, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to reduce planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, directly informing the roadmap's longer-horizon AI capability investments.

Synthesized structured discovery findings from 20+ stakeholder interviews across Operations and Engineering into a sequenced roadmap that balanced near-term agent productivity wins with longer-horizon platform capabilities.
microsoft_2023: Drove **AI-enabled tool adoption** across 14 Azure service teams by conducting structured user research — including live workflow observations and interviews — to surface friction points and tailor onboarding, saving **37 engineering hours** monthly.

Shaped the product roadmap by facilitating 11+ discovery interviews with frontline Azure service teams, getting past stated requests to uncover root-cause gaps and securing stakeholder alignment to add **intent-based YAML generation** as a prioritized capability.

Improved agent productivity and data retrieval quality by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and reducing friction for day-to-day operator workflows.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by leading stakeholder discovery across 140+ teams and securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework that sequenced near-term wins against longer-horizon platform goals.

Mobilized a product strategy to reduce frontline operational toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region, then building a roadmap to automate the highest-friction critical paths.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments by engineering a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil metrics across 140+ teams, establishing a data-driven foundation for roadmap sequencing decisions.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and aligning Operations, IT, and Engineering stakeholders on a sequenced execution plan.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies — sprint planning, backlog grooming, and retrospectives — **resolving 40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process by applying structured prioritization frameworks tied to operator workflow outcomes.

Drove cross-functional alignment between IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement automated CI/CD pipelines, **accelerating software deployment cycles by 25%** and reducing toil for frontline technical operators managing station-level software rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end customer workflow — scoping, proposals, and invoicing — for 200+ monthly engagements through a new CRM process, directly improving frontline agent productivity and customer outcome quality.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion by 2.7% by executing a data-informed go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile based on channel performance metrics and iterating on findings.

Improved leadership pricing decisions by conducting financial profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, identifying and sealing margin leaks and translating discovery findings into actionable roadmap recommendations for operations stakeholders.
